summary: Workflow references non-existent fixtures/sample.json and ./tests directory, preventing execution. PowerShell code follows best practices (Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference, parameter validation, comprehensive error handling). Minor inefficiencies: array += concatenation in Format-JsonReport creates new arrays repeatedly; Format-MarkdownReport redundantly filters pre-sorted results. No function help documentation. No evidence of actionlint validation or act testing.
